messages.content: # So, you've plugged in your xbox controller, you've set your binds in CM and you're all ready to go? Then you load in and the binds dont work? Follow this guide!

## Method 1
> Go to Assetto Corsa in steam and click the controller button that the green arrow is pointing at.
> You then want to click the A button/next until you see **Enable Steam Input**. Clicking this should allow your binds to work!
